projects.title: National Utility GIS Platform
projects.shortDesc: Enterprise web GIS for 12,000+ km of transmission infrastructure.
projects.description: Delivered a full-stack mapping platform with layer management, asset editing workflows, and role-based access for 200+ field engineers. Integrated with existing SCADA feeds for live substation status overlays.

projects.title: Logistics Fleet Tracker
projects.shortDesc: Real-time tracking for 450+ delivery vehicles across three cities.
projects.description: Built a fleet management dashboard with live GPS tracking, automated ETA calculations, and geofence-based delivery confirmations. Reduced missed delivery windows by 34% in the first quarter after launch.

projects.title: Warehouse Geofence System
projects.shortDesc: Automated dock arrival alerts across 18 distribution centers.
projects.description: Implemented circular and polygon geofences around loading bays with SMS and webhook notifications triggered on truck entry. Integrated with the client's TMS for automatic gate pass generation.

projects.title: Retail Catchment Analysis
projects.shortDesc: Drive-time isochrones and demographic overlays for site selection.
projects.description: Analyzed 150+ candidate store locations using 10-minute drive-time polygons, population density layers, and competitor proximity scoring. The model guided expansion into five new markets with validated revenue projections.

projects.title: Agricultural Field Survey App
projects.shortDesc: Offline mobile app for crop boundary mapping across 8,000 hectares.
projects.description: Developed an Android field survey tool with offline map tiles, GPS boundary tracing, and photo attachments. Data syncs to a central PostGIS database used for yield forecasting and subsidy compliance.

projects.title: Municipal Asset Tracking
projects.shortDesc: GPS tracking and maintenance scheduling for 300 municipal vehicles.
projects.description: Deployed GPS hardware and a web dashboard for the municipal fleet including garbage trucks, water tankers, and maintenance vans. Automated maintenance reminders based on odometer readings and engine hours.
